sections.paragraph:
verb לאכול

to eat, consume; to use up; to eat up

verb להיאכל

be eaten; consumed, destroyed

verb לאכל

to consume; burn; corrode; etch; digest

verb אוכל

be consumed; burnt; etched; digested

verb להתאכל

be consumed; burnt; etched; digested

verb להאכיל

to feed, make eat

verb הואכל

be fed, be given food

verb לאכל (>>איכל)

to consume; burn; corrode; etch; digest
